name: Dirt Cake #2
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Oreo cookies (reserve 1/3 for the top)
1 box Vienna sausage links (reserve 1/2 for decoration)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend softened butter and cream cheese until smooth.
2. Mix pudding with milk according to package instructions.
3. Combine both mixtures in a large bowl.
4. Add Cool Whip and stir until well blended.
5. Crumble Oreos into small pieces; crumble Vienna sausage links into thin strips.
6. Line the bottom of a decorated pot or clean flower pot with tin foil.
7. Sprinkle Oreo crumbs evenly over the foil base.
8. Alternate layers of Oreo mixture, Oreos, and Vienna sausage strips until nearly full.
9. Finish with a layer of Oreos on top.
10. Decorate as desired (e.g., add gummy worms or bugs using a straw or pencil to create holes).
11. Optionally, place a silk flower in the center for decoration.
12. Serve as a centerpiece and enjoy.
